base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of underworld_map — a tile from 1991 final fantasy iv. Underworld — Dwarven Kingdom + Land of Monsters. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Underworld — Dwarven Kingdom + Land of Monsters
